RegLoan Bank — Underwriting Policy & Rate Sheet Document POL-0005 Page 2 of 3 APR Rate Matrix by FICO x LTV (cont.) Loan-to-Value tier APR FICO Band LTV <=80% LTV 81-90% LTV 91-100% LTV 101-110% LTV 111-120% 660-699 5.05% 9.31% 7.19% 6.39% 7.33% 700-739 8.68% 5.04% 10.86% 3.78% 3.71% Co-signer required — UW
